# GEO Optimizer

> Open-source toolkit to audit, fix, and optimize websites for AI search engine visibility. Score 0-100 based on 47 research-backed methods.

## Main sections

- [Audit](https://geoready.dev/): Run a GEO audit on any URL. Get an 8-category score with actionable fixes.
- [Compare](https://geoready.dev/compare/): Side-by-side comparison of two URLs.
- [Analyze Competitors](https://geoready.dev/analyze-competitors/): Multi-URL competitor analysis.
- [Research](https://geoready.dev/research/): Peer-reviewed research foundation (Princeton KDD 2024, AutoGEO ICLR 2026).
- [Roadmap](https://geoready.dev/roadmap/): Planned and in-progress features.
- [Manifesto](https://geoready.dev/manifesto/): Why GEO Optimizer exists and what it stands for.
- [Privacy Policy](https://geoready.dev/privacy/): GDPR-compliant privacy policy.
- [Cookie Policy](https://geoready.dev/cookie-policy/): Cookie and storage inventory.

## Key facts

- GEO Optimizer is MIT licensed and free.
- Install via pip: `pip install geo-optimizer-skill`
- Source code: https://github.com/Auriti-Labs/geo-optimizer-skill
- PyPI package: https://pypi.org/project/geo-optimizer-skill/
- Documentation: https://auriti-labs.github.io/geo-optimizer-skill/
- 8 scoring categories: robots.txt, llms.txt, schema, meta tags, content, signals, AI discovery, brand & entity.
- CLI commands: `geo audit`, `geo fix`, `geo llms`, `geo schema`.
- Also available as an MCP server for integration with AI coding assistants.

## Research sources

- GEO: Generative Engine Optimization — KDD 2024 (https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09701)
- AutoGEO: Automatic Generative Engine Optimization — ICLR 2026 (https://openreview.net/forum?id=K8EinVWtUB)
- AI Citations Report 2026 — industry report
- C-SEO Bench — internal benchmark
- Schema Markup & AI Citations — product analysis
- AI Mode Citation Factors — product analysis

## Full context

- [Full LLM context](https://geoready.dev/llms-full.txt): Extended machine-readable context for GEO Optimizer.

## Contact

- Technical issues: https://github.com/Auriti-Labs/geo-optimizer-skill/issues
